zh.Austrått, Ørland Prestegjeld, Sør-Trønde: 挪威奧-特洛德拉格奧藍德 普雷斯特爾德奧斯特奧特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Finn Arnesson於1005年出生在挪威時，他的父親Árne Arnmodssen of Giske47歲，母親Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige34歲。他於1023年與Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir在蘇格蘭奧可尼結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1062年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norway: 挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾吉斯可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Finn Arnesson于1005年出生在挪威时，他的父亲Árne Arnmodssen of Giske47岁，母亲Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige34岁。他于1023年与Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir在苏格兰奧可尼结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1062年在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arnesson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Helmer, Alf, Arnt.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Arnesen or of the Swedish cognate Arnesson. This form of the surname is also found in Sweden, but it is rare there.
Possibly also an altered form of English Arnison (see Arnson ).

variants.name: Arnesen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Aksel, Alf, Arndt, Egil, Niels, Ottar.
Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Arne, a short form of any of various Norse names of which arn ‘eagle’ is the first element (see Arne 1).

nameMeanings.name: Finn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a transferred use of the surname derived in the Middle Ages from the Old Norse personal name Finnr ‘Finn’, used both as a byname and as a short form of various compound names with this first element, or an adoption of the Irish name . The name has recently enjoyed considerable popularity.

en.lifeSummary: When Finn Arnesson was born in 1005, in Norway, his father, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, was 47 and his mother, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, was 34. He married Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir in 1023, in Orkney, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1062, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Finn Arnesson est né en 1005, à Norvège, son père, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir en 1023, à Orkney, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1062, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Finn Arnesson 1005 in Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Árne Arnmodssen of Giske 47 und seine Mutter Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige 34. Er hat 1023 in Orkney, Scotland Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1062 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Finn Arnesson è nato il nel 1005 nel Norvegia, il suo padre, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir nel 1023, nel Orkney, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1062, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Finn Arnessonが1005年にノルウェーで生まれた時，父Árne Arnmodssen of Giskeは47歳，母Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaigeは34歳であった。1023年にスコットランドオルクニーでBergljót Hálfdansdóttirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1062年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Finn Arnesson(이)가 1005년 노르웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Árne Arnmodssen of Giske(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1023년 스컷랜드 르니에서 Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1062년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Finn Arnesson nasceu em 1005, em Noruega, seu pai, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir em 1023, em Orkney, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1062, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Finn Arnesson родился в 1005 г. в местности Норвегия, его отцу по имени Árne Arnmodssen of Giske было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir в 1023 г. в местности орни, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1062 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Finn Arnesson nació en 1005, en Noruega, su papá, Árne Arnmodssen of Giske, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Tora Torsteinsdatter Gaige, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Bergljót Hálfdansdóttir en 1023, en Orkney, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1062, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
